timeline.label: Q1 2026 10-Q: revenue $231.3M (+34% YoY), net income $17.3M; cash $872.3M; debt $234.2M
FY2025 10-K: revenue $901.3M (+15% YoY), operating income $109.4M, OCF $10.3M; deferred revenue $252.5M
FY2024 10-K baseline: revenue $782.1M, operating income $151.0M, OCF $152.5M
Shanghai STVC files SC 13D/A showing continued activist-style ownership stake
Shanghai STVC initial SC 13D filing; large shareholder with board influence intent
FY2021 10-K: revenue $257.8M; company scaling wet clean platform post-IPO growth phase
Initial public offering on Nasdaq; raises growth capital for China and global fab expansion
ACM Research founded; focuses on wet clean equipment for semiconductor manufacturing

industry.structure: Semiconductor capital equipment oligopoly for front-end and advanced packaging: Applied Materials, Lam Research, and Tokyo Electron dominate broad segments; ACMR competes in specialized wet clean and electroplating niches with high customer qualification barriers.
industry.share_shift: ACMR gained share in wet clean and SAPS tools as China fabs expanded capacity; FY2025 revenue +15% YoY but margin compression signals intensifying competition and mix shift.
industry.trend: Advanced packaging (HBM, chiplets) drives electroplating and cleaning tool demand; U.S. export controls and China fab spending cycles create volatility in order timing and cash conversion.
